c.d: The breadth and depth of available movies, including new releases, classics, and exclusive content.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, third-party reviews

c.d: The resolution and overall visual fidelity of the movie streams (e.g., HD, 4K, Dolby Vision).
The number and length of advertisements during movie playback for free, ad-supported services.
The ease of navigation, search functionality, and overall user experience within the app.
The ability to download movies for offline viewing without an internet connection.
The range of devices (smartphones, tablets, smart TVs, streaming devices) on which the app is available.
The monthly or annual fee required to access the movie content.
Availability of exclusive movies and TV shows produced by the streaming service.
The average rating given by users on app stores.
The availability of subtitles in multiple languages.
